result.stdout:
USAGE: feersum-scheme [--help] [--version] [--configuration <debug|release>]
                      [--outputtype <exe|lib|script>] [--corelibpath <path>]
                      [--generatedeps <bool>] [--assemblyversion <ver>]
                      [--reference <path>] [--output <out>] [<source file>...]

COMPILE:

    <source file>...      Scheme source files for compilation.

OPTIONS:

    --version             Print the program version and exit.
    --configuration <debug|release>
                          The build configuration (Debug / Release).
    --outputtype <exe|lib|script>
                          The output type (Lib / Exe / Script).
    --corelibpath <path>  Location of mscorelib.dll, or System.Runtime.dll.
    --generatedeps <bool> Generate .deps.json and .runtimeconfig.json stubs.
    --assemblyversion <ver>
                          Specify the version for the generated assembly.
    --reference, -r <path>
                          Compiled Scheme assembly to reference.
    --output, -o <out>    The output path to write compilation results to.
    --help                display this list of options.
